name: GREENLIT VENTURES INC.
business: Greenlit Ventures Inc. is a marketing and management consulting company that provides advisory services to companies located in Asia. The company has also entered the encryption industry with the beta launch of ForceShield Mail and ForceShield VPN.

exposures.sentence: On November 2, 2021, Greenlit reported that it has entered the encryption industry with the beta launch of Forceshield Mail, a fully-featured secure e-mail service.

On November 22, 2021, Greenlit also announced the beta launch of ForceShield VPN, a state-of-the-art encrypted VPN service that seeks to achieve synergy with the Company's prior product, ForceShield Mail, to provide users with robust protection against privacy intrusions and other cyber-related crimes.
